sql: WITH t AS ( SELECT ct.strategy_id s, ct.net_sol, ct.entry_ts, ct.entry_drift_pct drift, ct.entry_ts - COALESCE(g.migration_timestamp, g.timestamp) age_sec, CASE WHEN gm.open_price_sol > 0 THEN 100.0*(ct.entry_price_sol/gm.open_price_sol - 1.0) END ext_pct FROM copy_trades ct JOIN graduations g ON g.id = (SELECT MAX(g2.id) FROM graduations g2 WHERE g2.mint = ct.mint) LEFT JOIN graduation_momentum gm ON gm.graduation_id = g.id WHERE ct.status='closed' AND ct.net_sol IS NOT NULL AND ct.strategy_id IN ('copy-hotlead-strict','copy-hotlead-hold30m') ), b AS ( SELECT s s2, (MIN(entry_ts)+MAX(entry_ts))/2 mid FROM t GROUP BY s ), f AS ( SELECT t.*, CASE WHEN entry_ts < mid THEN 1 ELSE 2 END half FROM t JOIN b ON b.s2 = t.s ), u AS ( SELECT s, half, 'g0_base' g, net_sol FROM f UNION ALL SELECT s, half, 'g1_age60m', net_sol FROM f WHERE age_sec < 3600 UNION ALL SELECT s, half, 'g2_dip', net_sol FROM f WHERE drift <= 0 UNION ALL SELECT s, half, 'g3_ext50', net_sol FROM f WHERE ext_pct IS NULL OR ext_pct < 50 UNION ALL SELECT s, half, 'g12', net_sol FROM f WHERE age_sec < 3600 AND drift <= 0 UNION ALL SELECT s, half, 'g13', net_sol FROM f WHERE age_sec < 3600 AND (ext_pct IS NULL OR ext_pct < 50) UNION ALL SELECT s, half, 'g23', net_sol FROM f WHERE drift <= 0 AND (ext_pct IS NULL OR ext_pct < 50) UNION ALL SELECT s, half, 'g123', net_sol FROM f WHERE age_sec < 3600 AND drift <= 0 AND (ext_pct IS NULL OR ext_pct < 50) ), r AS (SELECT s, half, g, net_sol, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s, half, g ORDER BY net_sol DESC) rk FROM u) SELECT s, g, half, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(net_sol),2) net, ROUND(AVG(net_sol),4) avg_net, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN rk>3 THEN net_sol ELSE 0 END),2) xt3 FROM r GROUP BY s, g, half ORDER BY s, g, half
